title: Women's health - NHS
text:
h
Including arthritis, osteoporosis and fibromyalgia
Breast health
Including breast pain, breast lumps and breast screening
Cancer
Cancers that can affect women, and cancer screening for women
Dementia
Some types of dementia, such as Alzheimer's, affect more women than men
Domestic violence, abuse or rape
What to do if you experience domestic violence, abuse or rape
Heart health
Including heart attack and palpitations
HRT (hormone replacement therapy)
Find out about different types of HRT to treat symptoms of menopause and perimenopause
Infertility
Information on fertility problems and potential treatments
Mental health
Get information and support for mental health, including depression and anxiety
Pelvic health
Conditions that can affect your pelvic area and how to do pelvic floor exercises
Sexual health
Including sexually transmitted infections (STIs) and visiting a sexual health clinic
